zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan De Hoyville於大約1245年出生在英國奧可福爾普頓時，她的父親Hugh De Hoyvil39歲，母親Christian de Sandford39歲。她與Hugh du Plessis Baron of Arundel結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan De Hoyville于大约1245年出生在英国奧可福爾普頓时，她的父亲Hugh De Hoyvil39岁，母亲Christian de Sandford39岁。她与Hugh du Plessis Baron of Arundel结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: De

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan De Hoyville was born about 1245, in Hempton, Oxfordshire, England, her father, Hugh De Hoyvil, was 39 and her mother, Christian de Sandford, was 39. She married Hugh du Plessis Baron of Arundel. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan De Hoyville est née environ 1245, à Hempton, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Hugh De Hoyvil, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Christian de Sandford, avait 39 ans. Elle a épousé Hugh du Plessis Baron of Arundel. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan De Hoyville um 1245 in Hempton, Oxfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh De Hoyvil 39 und ihre Mutter Christian de Sandford 39. Sie hat Hugh du Plessis Baron of Arundel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan De Hoyville è nata il circa 1245 nel Hempton, Oxfordshire, England, sua padre, Hugh De Hoyvil, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Christian de Sandford, aveva 39 anni. Lei sposato Hugh du Plessis Baron of Arundel. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan De Hoyvilleが約1245年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアヘンプトンで生まれた時，父Hugh De Hoyvilは39歳，母Christian de Sandfordは39歳であった。Hugh du Plessis Baron of Arundelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスイギリスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan De Hoyville(이)가 대략 1245년 영국 스퍼드실르 헤프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh De Hoyvil(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Christian de Sandford(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 Hugh du Plessis Baron of Arundel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan De Hoyville nasceu aproximadamente 1245, em Hempton, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh De Hoyvil, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Christian de Sandford, tinha 39 anos. Ela casou-se com Hugh du Plessis Baron of Arundel. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan De Hoyville родилась около 1245 г. в местности хемптон, оксфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Hugh De Hoyvil было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Christian de Sandford, 39. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh du Plessis Baron of Arundel. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в местности Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan De Hoyville nació aproximadamente 1245, en Hempton, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh De Hoyvil, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Christian de Sandford, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Hugh du Plessis Baron of Arundel. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
